summary: Iter5 tier reward + public leaderboard tested end-to-end. Backend: 9/9 new iter5 tests pass; 63/64 total pass (1 flaky pre-existing iter4 test on referral_code length — unrelated). Frontend: home referral-banner + home-leaderboard render with real iter4/iter5 data; user dashboard ReferralPanel shows tier-progress, referral-leaderboard, and 'X bulan' free months card; admin PaymentsTab shows FREE MONTH badge on Rp 0 amount cells where free_month_applied=true.

minor.issue: gen_referral_code() occasionally returns <8 chars because secrets.token_urlsafe(6) can contain '-'/'_' which are stripped before slicing to 8. Iter4 test 'test_register_without_referral' flakes ~10% (observed 6-char 'PIU1Y8'). Fix: use secrets.token_urlsafe(12).replace('-','').replace('_','').upper()[:8] to guarantee >=8 chars after strip.

issues: Test data ('Iter5 t2_R', 'Iter4 rewA' etc.) is visible on public leaderboard — expected for test env but consider filtering test-prefixed users or cleaning DB before production.
Leaderboard month_label shows 'July 2026' while system clock appears to be Jan-Jul 2026 — verify server timezone/date drift on the container; cosmetic only.

action_items: (Minor) Fix gen_referral_code() to always yield 8 chars (see backend_issues.minor).
(Optional) Cleanup or filter test-prefixed users from public leaderboard for production polish.
(Carry-over) SendGrid/Twilio still MOCKED — main agent flagged in problem statement.
critical_code_review_comments: maybe_grant_tier_rewards uses $addToSet on tiers_granted → naturally idempotent even if called multiple times. Good.
admin_create_payment correctly prioritises free_months_credit BEFORE referral_credit (elif branch). Verified: when both credits available, only free month is consumed; cash credit stays intact.
GET /api/leaderboard is public (no Depends(get_current_user)) as spec required — confirmed responds without cookies.
leaderboard pipeline correctly filters referrer_id/referred_id NOT NULL, so tier reward rows (referred_id=None) are excluded from cash-based rankings — correct behavior.
server.py is 1364 lines — approaching threshold; consider splitting into routers/*.py modules (referral, admin, midtrans, analytics).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of iter5 flows (referral-banner, home-leaderboard, tier-progress, referral-leaderboard, FREE MONTH badge)

seed_data_creation: iter5 tests create iter5_* users: statsuser, t1_R + 5 downstream, fm_R + 5 downstream (used tier1 free month), t2_R + 10 downstream, ex_A/ex_B. UI test creates 1 ui5_* user. All test data is Iter5-prefixed for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest -o addopts='' backend/tests/ --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/all.xml`. Tier thresholds: 5→+1mo, 10→+2mo (cum 3), 25→+5mo (cum 8). free_months_credit ALWAYS consumed before referral_credit in admin_create_payment. Leaderboard is public (no auth). Iter5 tier tests are heavy (register+pay 5–10 users per test) — runtime ~40s for iter5 alone.
